query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_updated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN maxDepth IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_maxDepth,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marineLife IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_marineLife,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_rating
FROM activity_spots 
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' AND name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Maaya Thila', 'Kudarah Thila', 'Dhigurah Beyru', 'Fotteyo Kandu', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'Dhonfanu Thila', 'Kuredu Express', 'Miyaru Kandu', 'Mulaku Kandu', 'British Loyalty Wreck', 'Addu Kandu', 'Villingili Kandu', 'Tiger Zoo');
